name: parietal lobe region volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of parietal lobe subregions for neurodegenerative and cognitive disorder evaluation.

attributes.name: parietal lobe volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left parietal lobe, clinically relevant for visuospatial and sensory processing.

attributes.name: parietal lobe volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right parietal lobe, clinically relevant for visuospatial and sensory processing.

attributes.name: primary sensory cortex volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left primary sensory cortex, clinically relevant for somatosensory function.

attributes.name: primary sensory cortex volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right primary sensory cortex, clinically relevant for somatosensory function.

attributes.name: superior parietal lobule volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left superior parietal lobule, clinically relevant for spatial orientation and attention.

attributes.name: superior parietal lobule volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right superior parietal lobule, clinically relevant for spatial orientation and attention.

attributes.name: supramarginal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left supramarginal gyrus, clinically relevant for language and phonological processing.

attributes.name: supramarginal gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right supramarginal gyrus, clinically relevant for language and phonological processing.
